title: alnus mirbelii var. acutissima
intro: Alnus mirbelii var. acutissima, also known as Korean alder or sharp-leaved alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Alnus mirbelii var. acutissima include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
